events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From Abbey Road to his All-Starr Band, what's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Sending a massive 79th birthday shout-out to the legendary Brian May! His riffs are out of this world – literally, he's an astrophysicist! What's your top Queen track featuring his iconic guitar?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got the Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still strutting! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Which Rolling Stones anthem always gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its very first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed the Radio Star?
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed the game, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it, though? Or did it just give us more to love?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today in 1994.

angles.name: A Supersonic Debut
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! That album defined a generation. What's your favourite track from their explosive debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place 57 years ago in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. The King would have been 91. His music still reigns supreme – what's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering a Legend
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55. A true icon whose words still resonate. What's your go-to Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Genius Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. He would have been 84. His influence is timeless. What's the Hendrix track that blew your mind?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago today in 1969.

angles.name: Crossing That Road
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as famous as the music within. What's your favourite track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Always a 'Rock 'n' Roll Star'. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' 51 years ago today in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still inspires hope and unity around the world. What does this iconic track mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the very first iPod 25 years ago today in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple dropped this game-changer, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme tunes, who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate 007 film for you?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's the Lennon song that means the most to you?
